emails.subject: Meeting
emails.body: Meeting Please arrange a room for an East Power Mtg at 10:00 am this morning. Agenda: UBS Warburg Energy Closing/Implementation Organization/Roles On-line products (which products and when) Power documents (EEI and ISDA)

emails.subject: RE: Meeting
emails.body: RE: Meeting Is this for the entire group or just the desk heads? To: Black, Tamara Jae

emails.subject: RE: Meeting
emails.body: The whole group. Please type the short agenda I have prepared. Thanks.

emails.subject: RE: Meeting
emails.body: I won't be in until about 9:30 because I have to get my drug test done.
